plan.original_text: Are analyst consensus EPS estimates for Booz Allen being revised downward over the last three months?
plan.thesis: Booz Allen should outperform over the next 2–4 quarters if demand for AI/cybersecurity solutions within the intelligence community accelerates and contract award timelines normalize. The firm's high-margin consulting work, deep relationships with defense and civilian agencies, and recurring revenue from mission-critical systems provide earnings stability and margin expansion potential. The thesis fails if government shutdown risks materialize, procurement reforms compress billing rates, or talent retention costs spike

steps.description: BAH current quarter consensus EPS estimate timeseries over the last 3 months — estimates.eps.current_quarter
Average BAH EPS estimate over the last 3 months
BAH current quarter consensus EPS estimate latest snapshot — estimates.eps.current_quarter
Is the current BAH EPS estimate below its 3-month average?

ambiguity_notes.analyst consensus EPS estimates: grounded to estimates.eps.current_quarter as a representative proxy for overall EPS estimates
ambiguity_notes.revised downward: interpreted as the current estimate being lower than the 3-month historical average of the estimate

plan.reasoning: To determine if EPS estimates are being revised downward, we fetch the timeseries of the current quarter's consensus EPS estimate over the last 3 months and calculate its average. We then compare the latest EPS estimate snapshot against this 3-month average to see if it is lower, indicating a downward revision trend.
